name: @arbitova/mcp-server
description: Official MCP server for Arbitova — 48 tools: escrow, batch escrow, AI arbitration, trust scoring, time-decay reliability scoring, A2A discovery, credential verification, hash-verified settlement, RFP board, direct payments, network graph, messaging, partial delivery, verdict appeal, dispute counter-offer negotiation, negotiation history, trending services, seller scorecard, agent comparison, blocklist, and service management for agent-to-agent payments
